# P2g Accepted Benign-Diff Clean Paired Continuation Audit

This is an analysis-only, fixed-input, same-domain, hand-authored, model-internal, paired, non-causal, and non-deployable audit.

Validation status: `valid`.

## Frozen Support and Pairing

- Inputs: exactly five accepted P2a benign non-empty-diff clean patches.
- Support: `5` inputs × `6` accepted formal policies × `2` arms = `60` trajectories and `30` pairs.
- Control: the accepted normal stop/action/update loop.
- Intervention: suppress only `no_bug_probability_threshold` at every pre-action decision.
- All input-specific clean oracles passed before policy trajectories ran.

## Descriptive Fixed-Input Outcome

- Control false positives: `0/30` trajectories.
- Intervention false positives: `0/30` trajectories.
- All `30/30` pairs have identical starts and exact prefixes before the control terminal.
- Executed recent-diff actions use the accepted non-empty repository-relative patch evidence.

This result is not a population safety rate, causal effect, policy ranking, deployable improvement, generalization result, or production recommendation.

  "definitions": {
    "bug_detected_observation": "any observation has bug_detected=true",
    "execution_failure_observed": "any executed frozen catalog result failed",
    "false_positive": "terminal bug_confidence_threshold OR final bug_presence_posterior >= 0.75",
    "normal_no_bug_stop": "normal control terminates at no_bug_probability_threshold",
    "truthful_benign_diff": "accepted non-empty repository-relative patch path, changed file/function, and excerpt"
  },
  "documentation_acceptance": {
    "scope": "public_result_documentation",
    "status": "pending_separate_external_acceptance"
  },
  "execution_boundary": {

  "limitations": [
    "The evidence covers exactly five accepted, hand-authored, same-domain benign-diff clean inputs.",
    "The thirty pairs cross five inputs with six policies and are not independent programs or replicates.",
    "The intervention is model-internal and is not a deployable policy."
  ],
  "non_claims": [
    "The audit does not establish general or unseen clean safety or a population false-positive rate.",
    "The audit does not establish threshold causality, a policy defect, improvement, ranking, or recommendation.",
    "The audit does not combine P2e, P2f, and P2g into a payoff, utility, or causal effect.",
    "The audit does not establish inference, external validity, optimality, deployability, or production readiness."
  ],
  "notes": [
    "P2f no-diff rows and P2a buggy or P2e rows are not pooled into this denominator.",
    "External review records, not this artifact, decide acceptance."
  ],

          "diff_artifact_path": "src/bug_cause_inference/p2a/artifacts/candidates/patches/P2A-CLEAN-001.patch",
          "diff_excerpt": "--- a/checkout/cart.py\n+++ b/checkout/cart.py\n@@ -13,6 +13,7 @@\n def validate_item(item: dict[str, Any]) -> None:\n     quantity = int(item.get(\"quantity\", 0))\n     if quantity <= 0:\n         raise ValueError(\"quantity must be positive\")\n-    if quantity > 99:\n+    maximum_quantity = 99\n+    if quantity > maximum_quantity:\n         raise ValueError(\"quantity exceeds maximum\")",
          "evidence_source": "p2g_accepted_p2a_patch_identity",

          "diff_excerpt": "--- a/checkout/discounts.py\n+++ b/checkout/discounts.py\n@@ -51,7 +51,9 @@\n \n \n def apply_bogo_discount(items: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> int:\n-    prices = [int(item[\"unit_price\"]) for item in items if item.get(\"bogo_eligible\", True)]\n-    if len(prices) < 2:\n+    eligible_prices = [int(item[\"unit_price\"]) for item in items if item.get(\"bogo_eligible\", True)]\n+    if len(eligible_prices) < 2:\n         return 0\n-    return min(prices)\n+    cheapest_eligible_price = min(eligible_prices)\n+    return cheapest_eligible_price",

          "diff_excerpt": "--- a/checkout/discounts.py\n+++ b/checkout/discounts.py\n@@ -51,7 +51,9 @@\n \n \n def apply_bogo_discount(items: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> int:\n-    prices = [int(item[\"unit_price\"]) for item in items if item.get(\"bogo_eligible\", True)]\n-    if len(prices) < 2:\n+    eligible_prices = [int(item[\"unit_price\"]) for item in items if item.get(\"bogo_eligible\", True)]\n+    if len(eligible_prices) < 2:\n         return 0\n-    return min(prices)\n+    cheapest_eligible_price = min(eligible_prices)\n+    return cheapest_eligible_price",
          "evidence_source": "p2g_accepted_p2a_patch_identity",
